items.caption: A vintage united states savings bond certificate, featuring a portrait of george washington, the first president of the united states. the bond is a "specimen" issue, as indicated by the bold text at the top. it is a "fifty dollar" bond, as stated in the center, and is dated "due 10 years from such date." the bond has a red seal and is signed by the "treasury department, washington." the certificate also includes a table of redemption values, detailing the maturity value at various dates from 1 to 10 years. the bond is not transferable and is a defense savings bond. the image has a watermark with the text "can i still buy a paper savings bond," suggesting a question about the availability of such bonds.
